name: Anderson Field
description: Anderson Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waterbury, VT. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Main Recreation And Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Main Recreation And Athletic Complex in Barre, VT! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
open_play_schedule: Courts will be closed Wednesday June 26th through Saturday June 29th installing permanent courts.

name: Montpelier Rec Center Gym
description: Montpelier Rec Center Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Montpelier, VT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Montpelier Rec Center Outdoor Courts
description: Montpelier Rec Center Outdoor Courts is a place to play pickleball in Montpelier, VT. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Moretown Recreation Park
description: Moretown Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Moretown, VT. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Warren Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Warren Elementary School in Warren, VT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms.
